The Story

Born From the Heartland

Mellencougar began in 2007 when a group of radio veterans from the Illinois/Midwest scene decided to do the one thing nobody else had dared — bring John Cougar Mellencamp's heartland sound back to life with the authenticity it deserves.

Shortly after forming, General Manager Don Wilson received a personal call from Toby Myers — John's bass player from 1980–2001 — inviting them to play his 64th birthday celebration. That night, both Toby Myers and Moe Z M.D. (JCM Keys & Vocals, 1998–2005) joined them on stage. No other tribute band can say that.

Since then, Mellencougar has earned rave reviews from Toby's own barn stage to festivals, casinos, theaters, and parks across America. They are the only tribute to John Mellencamp — a distinction that makes every show far more than an imitation.

Available as a headline act or premium festival opener, Mellencougar delivers a full Mellencamp experience for your venue, festival, casino, park district, or private event.

Signature Songs

  • Pink Houses
  • Jack & Diane
  • Hurt So Good
  • Small Town
  • R.O.C.K. in the U.S.A.
  • Wild Night
  • Rain on the Scarecrow
  • Paper in Fire
  • Check It Out
  • I Need A Lover
  • Ain't Even Done
  • Our Country
  • Crumblin' Down
  • Key West Intermezzo
  • American Girl*
  • Runnin' Down a Dream*

*Tom Petty tribute selections

Celebrity Guest Appearances

  • Toby Myers — JCM Bass, 1980–2001
  • Moe Z M.D. — JCM Keys, 1998–2005
  • Bobby Clark — JCM Drums
  • Mimi Mapes — JCM Vocalist
  • Joe Mellencamp — John's Brother

Live Performance

See Them Live

More Videos → Facebook Live Clips →

Mellencougar brings every watt of Mellencamp's heartland energy to your stage. Full band. Full sound. The fiddle sings, the guitars roar, and the crowd dances from the first note to the last.

When Toby Myers joined them on stage and said "close your eyes and you'll think you're at a Mellencamp concert" — that said everything a buyer needs to know.
